name: ANALOG DEVICES INC
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) is a semiconductor company that designs, manufactures, and markets integrated circuits, software, and subsystems. ADI's products include data converters, amplifiers, radio frequency ICs, power management products, sensors, and signal processing solutions. The company serves industrial, automotive, communications, and consumer markets globally, providing high-performance analog, mixed-signal, and digital signal processing technologies.

products.name: Data Converters
products.description: Analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog converter integrated circuits for signal processing applications.

products.name: Amplifiers
products.description: High-performance amplifier ICs used in industrial, automotive, and communications applications.

products.name: Radio Frequency ICs
products.description: RF integrated circuits for wireless and communications infrastructure applications.

products.name: Power Management Products
products.description: ICs for power conversion, management, and distribution across multiple end markets.

products.name: Sensors
products.description: Sensing solutions including MEMS and other sensor technologies for industrial and automotive use.

products.name: Signal Processing Solutions
products.description: Mixed-signal and digital signal processing subsystems for complex system-level applications.
